action: Complete ImageNet missing methods: run SWD, DefazioCorrective, NoWD on ImageNet/ResNet-50 with 3 seeds each (90 epochs). Also complete CWD with 2 more seeds.
rationale: Table 5 is unpublishable with 4/7 methods and CWD at 1 seed. NoWD is essential for BEM computation on ImageNet.

action: Run CWD vs halved-lambda ablation: FixedWD at lambda=5e-5 on CIFAR-10, 3 seeds, 200 epochs.
rationale: The CWD magnitude confound is the most important unresolved question. This 2-hour experiment resolves it definitively.

action: Restructure contributions: drop UDWDC as a primary algorithmic contribution. Reframe the paper as (1) PID taxonomy of WD methods, (2) diagnostic metrics (BEM, CSI, AIS), (3) comprehensive empirical study with honest negative results. UDWDC becomes a case study demonstrating the framework's diagnostic value, not a proposed algorithm.
rationale: UDWDC underperforms NoWD -- presenting a net-negative algorithm as a contribution damages the paper's credibility.

action: Recompute CSI from 200-epoch full-run data (phase1_diagnostic results are available). Update Table 6 and Figure 4.
rationale: Using 10-epoch pilot CSI as primary evidence is methodologically weak when 200-epoch data exists.

action: Fix UDWDC ImageNet std calculation. Verify all standard deviations across all tables using consistent estimator (sample std, ddof=1). Document the estimator used.
rationale: Numerical errors in a paper about standardized evaluation metrics are especially damaging.

action: Add proofs or proof sketches for Theorem 1, Proposition 2, and Proposition 3. If proofs cannot be provided, downgrade to 'Conjecture' and 'Claim.'
estimated_cost: ~2-4 hours for proof sketches (if proofs exist), 30 minutes to downgrade labels
rationale: Formal theoretical claims without proofs will be flagged by any competent reviewer.

action: Fix Figure 3 caption to match actual figure values. The caption claims SNR range ~0.145 to ~0.315 but the figure shows values in ~0.003 to ~0.010 range.
rationale: Caption-figure inconsistency is an immediate credibility red flag.

action: Fix CSI metric definition to handle FixedWD's zero-variance case without ad-hoc normalization. Consider using relative variance or adding epsilon to the denominator.
rationale: A proposed metric that requires special-casing for the most important baseline is not well-defined.

action: Fix UDWDC-v2 by excluding BN layers from the WD control loop. Re-run Phase 1 with fixed UDWDC-v2.
rationale: The current UDWDC-v2 is fundamentally broken due to BN layer inclusion. The fix is obvious (the paper itself suggests it) but was never implemented.

action: Remove Full_PID / UDWDC_v2 duplicate from Table 4 ablation. These are the same configuration with identical results.
rationale: Reporting the same configuration twice inflates the ablation and confuses readers.

action: Regenerate Figure 1 (rho trajectories) from 200-epoch full-run data instead of 10-epoch pilot.
rationale: The paper's primary visualization should use the same data as its primary quantitative results.

action: Discuss AIS limitations: negative LOO-CV R^2, NoWD having highest AIS, only 6 data points for global AIS correlation.
rationale: The AIS claims are oversold relative to the statistical evidence.

action: Clarify DDP configuration: actual batch size per GPU, number of GPUs used per run, whether DDP was used for all ImageNet experiments or only some.
rationale: Batch size affects alignment SNR (H3) and optimization trajectory. Inconsistent DDP usage confounds the results.

action: Retitle from 'Unified' to a more accurate scoping term. Update abstract to match actual (not aspirational) contributions.
rationale: Overclaiming in title/abstract is the fastest path to desk rejection.
